title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: MORROW COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HEPPNER CLINIC OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 110 N Court Street Heppner, OR 97836 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% FPL Hours: Wednesday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 676-5421 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 676-5421 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow County SITE HOURS: Wednesday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MORROW COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HEPPNER CLINIC
